title: Strippable Stone
description: Strip stones types to reverse stonecutting.
body:
If you ever have any excess polished blocks, bricks, stairs, slabs or walls that you want to turn back into the rock-related block used to craft, you can strip it to do so super simply! 

 

Feature example:

 

Version 1.3.0+ for 1.18.2 and 1.19.3

Alongside the many added block stripping options, you can utilise the config file to add some of your own stripped blocks.
